narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Estudos apontaram que a crise climática pode extinguir 90% dos mamíferos típicos da Caatinga e provocar perdas significativas na flora em 99% do bioma até 2060
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote amplifies fears about the consequences of climate change by stating that it may lead to the extinction of 90% of typical mammals in the Caatinga and significant losses in flora by 2060.
